story.title: Berlin Divide
story.logline: As a CIA operative in 1960s Berlin navigates the treacherous landscape of espionage, he must extract a Soviet defector and uncover the double agent within his own team before the KGB closes in.

acts.label: Introduction
acts.description: We meet CIA operative Ethan Ryder, working undercover in Berlin, where he must navigate the complex web of espionage to extract Soviet defector Igor Petrov before the KGB discovers their plan. Ryder's team consists of his trusted colleagues, Sofia Santos, and agent Alexei Kuznetsov, but Ryder's growing unease suggests that something is amiss within the team.

acts.label: Escalation
acts.description: As Ryder's extraction plan goes awry, he discovers that a double agent has infiltrated his team. Kuznetsov's loyalty is called into question, and Ryder must use all his skills to uncover the truth and stay one step ahead of the KGB. Meanwhile, Sofia's presence becomes increasingly crucial to the mission, but her motivations remain unclear.

acts.label: Climax
acts.description: Ryder, with the help of Sofia, must put an end to the double agent's plans before it's too late. The tension builds as they navigate the treacherous landscape of Berlin, with the KGB closing in on their every move. The fate of the mission and the lives of Ryder's team members hang in the balance.

acts.label: Resolution
acts.description: In the aftermath of the mission, Ryder must come to terms with the consequences of his actions and the secrets he's uncovered. The true extent of the double agent's betrayal is revealed, and Ryder must decide where his allegiances truly lie.

story.antagonist: Unknown double agent within Ryder's team
story.world: In a city divided by the Berlin Wall, espionage and counter-espionage are a way of life, and loyalty is a luxury few can afford.
